title: SurrogateInjected
description: Notification sent when a surrogate script is injected. Only emitted when surrogateInjectionEnabled is true. Native classifies via TrackerResolver.

url.description: The URL of the blocked tracker resource

pageUrl.description: The URL of the page where the surrogate was injected

surrogateName.description: The name of the surrogate that was injected (e.g., 'google-analytics.com/analytics.js')
